name: Every external API call must have explicit error handling
description: Code that invokes external APIs, third-party services, or network endpoints must have explicit error handling that either recovers, retries with backoff, or escalates with a logged error. Silent swallowing of errors is denied at code review.

policy.rationale: External calls fail. Without explicit error handling, every third-party outage becomes an unhandled exception that corrupts application state or silently drops data.
